title: IoT Sensor Event — Salmon Farm Telemetry
description: Canonical schema for water quality, biological, and environmental readings emitted by physical sensor units deployed in salmon farm cages. Published to Kafka topic: salmon.farm.sensor.telemetry

schema_version.description: Semantic version of this schema definition.

event_id.description: Globally unique UUIDv4 identifier for this event. Used for idempotency and deduplication by consumers.

event_type.description: Type discriminator. Always SENSOR_TELEMETRY for this schema.

timestamp.description: ISO 8601 timestamp with UTC offset representing the exact moment the sensor captured the reading.

producer.description: Identifies the physical hardware device that produced this event.

firmware_version.description: Semver firmware version running on the device.

location.description: Geographic and operational placement of the sensor.

farm_id.description: Unique farm identifier. Used as the Kafka partition key. Format: {COUNTRY_ISO}-FARM-{NUMBER}

farm_name.description: Human-readable name of the aquaculture facility.

cage_id.description: Identifier for the specific pen or cage within the farm.

depth_meters.description: Sensor deployment depth below water surface in meters.

region.description: High-level geographic region of the farm.

water_quality.description: Real-time physicochemical water measurements. Use explicit null for sensor faults — never omit a field.

temperature_celsius.description: Water temperature in degrees Celsius. Alert threshold: WARNING > 16.0, CRITICAL > 18.0

dissolved_oxygen_mg_l.description: Dissolved oxygen concentration in milligrams per liter. Alert threshold: WARNING < 9.0, CRITICAL < 7.0

oxygen_saturation_percent.description: Percent oxygen saturation relative to air at current temperature and salinity.

salinity_ppt.description: Water salinity in parts per thousand. Acceptable range: 28.0–36.0 ppt.

ph.description: Water pH level. Acceptable marine range: 7.0–8.5.

turbidity_ntu.description: Water turbidity in Nephelometric Turbidity Units. Alert threshold: WARNING > 10.0 NTU.

chlorophyll_a_ug_l.description: Chlorophyll-a concentration in micrograms per liter. Proxy for algae bloom risk. Alert: > 10.0 μg/L.

biological.description: Biological production data from pen monitoring systems.

fish_count_estimate.description: Estimated number of fish in the cage, typically derived from sonar or camera AI counting.

avg_biomass_kg.description: Estimated average individual fish weight in kilograms.

feeding_rate_kg_per_hour.description: Active feed dispensed in kilograms per hour by the automated feeding system.

lice_count_per_fish.description: Estimated average number of sea lice per fish. Regulatory treatment threshold: 0.5 per fish (Norway). CRITICAL alert if exceeded.

mortality_count_24h.description: Number of dead fish removed in the last 24-hour period. CRITICAL alert > 50 fish.

current_speed_m_s.description: Water current speed in meters per second.

algae_bloom_detected.description: Flag set by the local edge processor if a harmful algae bloom has been classified.

algae_bloom_type.description: Species of harmful algae detected. Must be null if algae_bloom_detected is false.

alerts.description: List of threshold breaches detected at the edge device level. Empty array [] if all readings are nominal.

alert_code.description: Machine-readable alert code for downstream routing and processing.

severity.description: Alert severity for triage and routing priority.

threshold_breached.description: The configured threshold value that was exceeded.

current_value.description: The actual sensor reading that triggered the alert.

message.description: Human-readable description of the alert condition.

data_quality.description: Metadata about the health and reliability of the sensor transmission.

signal_strength_dbm.description: RSSI signal strength in dBm. Typical acceptable range: > -80 dBm.

battery_level_percent.description: Remaining battery charge percentage. Alert if < 15%.

sensor_status.description: Overall operational status of the sensor unit.

missing_fields.description: List of field names within water_quality or biological that returned null due to sensor faults in this reading cycle.
